topics.title: Faculty can direct the students to design a tyre according to a particular need. Ensure that it is suitable for the course. Students should prepare the plan which includes the appropriate compounding ingredients and formulations for various tyre components.

Students can refer the appropriate code of practices. Students can fabricate different components of tyre with the help of suitable machineries. Assembling of tyres and curing of tyres should also be done according to the tyre type.
Any tyre testing methods can also be performed by the student on the tyre he/she has designed.
Students should submit the report to the faculty.
